SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-21-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-21-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY. PLAINTIFF JENNIFER SPARKS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HOME DEPOT USA INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ANGELA ROCHE DISTRICT MANAGER. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPARKS, JENNIFER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HOME DEPOT U.S.A. INC. D.B.A.  HOMEDEPOT SEE ATTACHED AND FULLY INCORPORATED ATTACHMENT 6(A). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
